decision.summary: No new action: with only 4 hours left in the daily session, there is no clean same-day edge left and the only valid live expression is the weekly 80k reach.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77660.74, still below the day's high with shorts dominant, but by this point only 4 hours remain until daily expiry. The daily board no longer offers any clean entry: 76k dip is only about 7.6%, 79k reach about 13%, and the rest are even weaker, so there is no same-day setup inside the preferred range and no realistic momentum continuation worth forcing late in the session. The earlier daily bearish idea has already passed, and the account snapshot now shows only the active weekly 80k reach plus the old discarded weekly 72k dip. The weekly 80k reach remains around 38.5%, still alive enough to keep as the structural upside alternative, but not strong enough for take-profit and not weak enough to require forced management. The next weekly upside strike, 82k reach, is only about 10.5%, too weak to justify a second weekly entry. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k reach and avoid opening anything new into a board where the daily edge has already disappeared.
